slot_type: # HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE:
# 1. Save a copy as  minor_YOURCODE.csv  (e.g. minor_MUSIC.csv
#    The code must match what appears in the student transcript: "MUSIC Minor" -> MUSIC
# 2. Delete these comment lines before saving.
# 3. Fill in rows using the column guide below.
# COLUMN GUIDE:
#   slot_type        "required" for a mandatory course
#   course_id        Official course ID exactly as it appears on transcripts  (e.g. "MUSC 2210")
#   course_name      Human-readable course name shown in the CPR map
#   credits          Credit hours (numeric)
#   pool_id          Group identifier for pool courses — all rows in the same pool share one ID
#                    (e.g. "pool_core"
#   pool_label       Friendly heading shown in the CPR map for this pool group
#                    (e.g. "Choose 2 Core Courses"). Leave blank to auto-generate.
#   pool_requirement How many the student must satisfy: "2 courses" or "9 credits"
#                    Leave blank for required courses.
#   prereq           Prerequisite course IDs in free text (e.g. "MUSC 1100"). Leave blank if none.
#   coreq            Corequisite course IDs in free text. Leave blank if none.
#   min_grade        Minimum passing grade for this requirement (e.g. "C-"). Leave blank if any pass.
#   notes            Any advisory notes shown in the CPR map.
# EXAMPLE — a simple 2-required + 1-pool-of-3 minor:
required
required
pool
pool
pool
